name: Credit for the Elderly and the Permanently and Totally Disabled

eligibility.description: Must meet age or disability requirements and fall below strict income thresholds (AGI generally under $17,500-$25,000 depending on filing status).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A 15% tax credit on a base amount for individuals age 65 or older or those retired on permanent and total disability.
